title: Multiversal Vanilla
description:
A simple modpack aiming to enhance the vanilla experience, adding only performance improvements, customization options and the Immersive Portals Mod.

Intended for use with servers to create a more immersive/unified experience between gamemodes.
body:
A simple modpack designed to enable a seamless vanilla-like experience with [Immersive Portals](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveportals), designed to be compatible with vanilla servers.

Based on [Additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive) to maximize performance, using some common shaderpacks including [Complimentary](https://www.complementary.dev/) and [Rethinking Voxels](https://modrinth.com/shader/rethinking-voxels) with a few minimal QOL tweaks from [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) enabled.

Compatible with (and recommended for) [Immersive Skyblock](https://modrinth.com/datapack/immersive-skyblock) and [Immersive Creative](https://modrinth.com/datapack/immersive-creative).
